sourceTitle: Referencing and generative AI - ANU LibGuide
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Generative AI tools and technologies, such as ChatGPT, may not be listed as authors of an ACM published Work. The use of generative AI tools and technologies to create content is permitted but must be fully disclosed in the Work.
